Good morning, Maísa. Tell me about your typical day.
Well, I always wake up at 6 in the morning.
That is early! What do you do first?
I usually have a coffee, and I get to work at 8.
And in the afternoon?
I often talk to clients. At noon, I have lunch with a colleague.
Do you work late?
No, I never work late. At night, I go home and relax.
I always wake up at 6 in the morning.
I usually get to work at 8.
At noon, I have lunch with a colleague.
I never work at night.
At night, I go home and relax.

Hi, this is David. Let me tell you about my day. I usually wake up at seven o'clock in the morning. I always have a big breakfast with coffee. Then I get to work at nine. In the morning, I often answer emails and calls. At one o'clock, I have lunch with my team. In the afternoon, I sometimes take a short break for coffee. I never work late at night. I go home at six, and I usually watch football on TV. What is your routine like?

Good morning. This is Sarah. My routine is very busy. I wake up early, at five thirty in the morning. I always go to the gym before work. Then I get to work at eight o'clock. I usually have three meetings in the morning. At noon, I have lunch, but I never take a long break. In the afternoon, I often call clients. At night, I go home and cook dinner. On weekends, I sometimes travel with my family. I love my routine!
Good morning. I wake up at six o'clock. Then I get to work at eight. At noon, I have lunch with a colleague. At night, I go home and relax.
